questions.question: What color is the rider's hat or headwear?
questions.rationale: Distinctive visual detail identifying the person in the scene

questions.question: What type of animal is the rider mounted on?
questions.rationale: Central to understanding the clip's content and animal interaction

questions.question: What is the color and material of the fence in the foreground?
questions.rationale: Establishes the setting and spatial context of the equestrian activity
